description_long: This forklift features a robust, industrial design with a predominantly yellow body and black structural elements. The vehicle has a protective overhead guard, an open operator cabin with a visible steering wheel and seat, and a rear engine compartment marked with 'CHS'. The front is equipped with two long, black fork arms attached to a vertical mast, designed for lifting and transporting heavy loads. The wheels are solid and black, suitable for urban and industrial surfaces. The overall appearance suggests durability and functionality, with clear separation between the operator area and the lifting mechanism.
description: A yellow industrial forklift with black fork arms, overhead guard, and a marked rear engine compartment. The open cabin and sturdy build highlight its utility for lifting and transporting loads.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open operator cabin, steering wheel, seat, and the full length of the fork arms extending forward.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the twin fork arms, vertical mast, and partial visibility of the operator seat behind the mast.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the operator area and the 'CHS' marking on the rear compartment.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the engine compartment with 'CHS' marking and the overhead guard, with the mast and fork arms visible in the background.
attribute_fork_arms: The forklift has two parallel, straight black fork arms that are long and rectangular in shape, with moderate thickness and squared-off tips. They are mounted at the front, extending horizontally from the mast, and appear sturdy and capable of supporting heavy loads.
attribute_overhead_guard: The overhead guard is a rectangular, open-frame structure made of black metal bars, providing coverage above the operator seat. It is designed to protect the operator from falling objects and extends from the front to the rear of the cabin.
attribute_mast: The mast is a vertical, double-stage structure constructed from black metal, with visible support beams and mounting points for the fork arms. It is robust and extends above the operator cabin, with no visible hydraulic components or lift chains.
attribute_operator_seat: The operator seat is a single, contoured black seat with a backrest, positioned centrally in the cabin. It appears to be made of molded plastic or vinyl, with no visible armrests, headrest, or seatbelt.
attribute_warning_lights: No visible warning lights are present on the forklift in any of the provided views.
